## Asset gate

- [ ] `docs/assets/asset-registry.yaml` checked
- [ ] No missing/ambiguous asset dependency
- [ ] User approval or explicit placeholder waiver recorded where required
- [ ] Registry/provenance updated for new files

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run version:check`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Rust format/clippy/tests where native code changed
- [ ] Keyboard/accessibility review where UI changed
- [ ] Visual baseline reviewed where approved assets/layout changed
- [ ] Acceptance criteria pass
- [ ] Specs/ADRs updated
